0000:00:1d.0 PCI bridge: Intel Corporation Sunrise Point-H PCI Express Root Port (rev f1)
	LnkSta2: Current De-emphasis Level: -3.5dB, EqualizationComplete+, EqualizationPhase1Successful+, Flit-
	Capabilities: [200 v1] Advanced Error Reporting
		UESta:	DLP- SDES- TLP- FCP- CmpltTO- CmpltAbrt- UnxCmplt- RxOF- MalfTLP- ECRC- UnsupReq- ACSViol-
		AERCap: First Error Pointer: 00, ECRCGenCap- ECRCGenEn- ECRCChkCap+ ECRCChkEn-
		HeaderLog: 04000001 0000220f 01070000 9eece789

01:00.0 Non-Volatile memory controller: PCIe 6.x Flit-capable NVMe Controller (rev 01)
	LnkSta2: Current De-emphasis Level: -3.5dB, EqualizationComplete+, EqualizationPhase1Successful+, Flit+
	Capabilities: [200 v2] Advanced Error Reporting
